summary.authoritative_rule: ambiguous local 5min hits may expand the supervision seed library only when they look like mild override watches; otherwise they remain explicit false-positive boundaries

triage_rows.rationale: ambiguous hits should only be promoted when they resemble genuine mild override behavior rather than ordinary prototype leakage
the broader prototype remains governance-only regardless of whether some ambiguous hits are retained as mild watch seeds

interpretation: V1.31X turns the ambiguous-hit case audit into a narrow governance verdict.
The decision here affects only the supervision seed library, not the lawful EOD primary replay.
